name: slumbiq-pipeline
description: End-to-end content pipeline for Slumbiq (@slumbiq), the ambient sleep audio channel. Bundles three carousel skills: template selection with on-brand copy writing, branded slide rendering with vignetted thumbnails, and cross-platform scheduling via Blotato across Instagram, TikTok, and Twitter. Room to grow with future skills for audio production, YouTube upload, and Gumroad sync.
